import React, { useState } from 'react'; import styles from './ListItem.module.css'; export default function ListItem() { const [form, setForm] = useState({ title: '', category: 'Books', condition: 'Good', price: '', dept: '', description: '' }); const [submitted, setSubmitted] = useState(false); const set = (k, v) => setForm(prev => ({ ...prev, [k]: v })); if (submitted) { return (
